queries.question: List all projects with the word poster and their associated textbooks and other supply items.
queries.sql: Select TextbookTitle, SupplyItem, ProjectDescription from Textbooks_Supplies_Projects where ProjectDescription like '%poster%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?textbooktitle ?supplyitem ?projectdescription WHERE {
  ?textbooks_supplies_projects a :Textbooks_Supplies_Projects .
  ?textbooks_supplies_projects p:TextbookTitle ?textbooktitle .
  ?textbooks_supplies_projects p:SupplyItem ?supplyitem .
  ?textbooks_supplies_projects p:ProjectDescription ?projectdescription .
  ?textbooks_supplies_projects p:ProjectDescription ?projectdescription_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?projectdescription_lk), "^.*poster.*$"))
}
